text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fsshhh... Fsshhh...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Wait... You want to talk... about my friend?
choice_data_list: Yes, I want to know more about her.
Yes, I want to know more about her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One night, I ask Manhattan Cafe about the entity
that's had such a huge influence on her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I remember overhearing something in the past. If I
recall correctly...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...The one who looks like me... She's my friend,
and I've known her since I was a child.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...She's led me here, but I can't let her outrun me
much longer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So Manhattan Cafe has known her friend since
childhood. But what does she mean her friend
"leads" her?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: What would you... like to know?
choice_data_list:
You said your friend "leads" you. What does
that mean?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
She leads me because... she's always running
ahead of me.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Actually, that's not quite right. She does more
than that...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: My friend... takes me to happy places...
Hehehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
To quiet places no one knows about... She shows
me in secret...
Hehehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
At the amusement park... she sat right on top of
the ferris wheel. I followed after her in a
carriage... The view was beautiful.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
When I chase after my friend, I always find
something fun...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: And if I ask, she always tells me where to go...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
No one else ever helped me out... but my friend
was different.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
She was the only one... who made me happy. She
was the only one...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Well... I hadn't thought about that. You're a little
like her now too.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
But I only met you because she led me to Tracen
Academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm starting to get it. Her friend isn't just some
figure running ahead of her in races...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To Manhattan Cafe, her friend is a kind of guide
to happiness.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Even now, she takes me anywhere I ask her to. For
example...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I want you to try thinking of something that
would be impossible to find in a place like this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Something impossible to find... And her friend is
going to take us to it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: An idea pops into my head. I suggest...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Lavender... The Lavandula plant of the Lamiaceae
family... It doesn't grow around here.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
But if we wish for it from the bottom of our
hearts...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thump!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A powerful force pushes me from behind. I break
out in a cold sweat as I head in the direction it
compels me to go...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: A boulder... Let's move it out of the way.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: On the count of three. One, two... nnngh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe channels her strength into her
slender arms, and we push the boulder aside. And
in its place...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It's a bunch of... seagrass. Each blade has a cluster
of flowers at the top...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Is this supposed to be a stand-in... for the
lavender we wished for?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is probably the best her friend can do. I think
it's safe to assume that she's not omnipotent.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe she's like a guardian spirit who does
whatever's in her power to help.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Marimo... Spherical clumps of algae that live in
places like Hokkaido's Lake Akan...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I doubt we'll find any in the area, but if we wish
for it from the bottom of our hearts...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thump!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A powerful force pushes me from behind. I break
out in a cold sweat as I head in the direction it
compels me to go...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... We've walked... quite a long way.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Oh? There's something washed up on the shore...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's a... ball of seaweed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A rounded clump of plant life that's died after
absorbing so much of the ocean's polluted
water...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It's not very appealing to look at... but perhaps
this is... a stand-in for the marimo we wished for?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is probably the best her friend can do. I think
it's safe to assume that she's not omnipotent.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe she's like a guardian spirit who does
whatever's in her power to help.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: This is how she guides me... straight to happiness.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
She's always by my side, helping me... My dear
friend...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps Manhattan Cafe made it to where she is
now thanks to this guardian spirit.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Look. There's a small island off in the sea...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I'm a little curious... I imagine it's a wonderful,
tranquil place.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look out to the ocean and see the island. But it's
not within swimming distance, and there's no
bridge or boat in sight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If we really want to see it for ourselves, we'll have
to...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thump, thump, thump!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suddenly feel several shoves from behind! It's as
if I'm being urged to go ahead without hesitating.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Oh, my friend is... waving at us...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
She's telling us to head toward her, across the
water...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's like a guardian spirit. And yet...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't tell if she has any intention of protecting
us.
